preconditions: Euro-Office v9.3.1 oracle runs on port 8088
both frames use the exact original SpreadsheetEditor runtime
fixture and native XLSY hashes match evidence

captured_steps.expected: Oracle displays CTOXRevenuePivot in E3:F7 and the page-break preview
CTOX displays the same PivotStyle, filter control, A4 landscape two-page geometry and manual row break
Both original editors accept the same advanced Pivot Table dialog action
Both original Header and Footer dialogs enable Erste Seite anders
Only pivotTable1.xml and sheet1.xml change; CTOX and Oracle both reopen document-ready
modules/spreadsheets.mount(ctx) commits through office.spreadsheet.commit over rxdb-webrtc until terminal

implementation_flow: Port pivot cache and pivot table XML records into the original XLSY protocol
Port SheetPr, SheetView, PageMargins, PageSetup, PrintOptions, HeaderFooter and row/column break records
Decode changed records and map Euro-Office internal pivot cache numbering back to the escrow OOXML relationship
Export only understood changed parts and preserve 16 of 18 parts byte-identically
Reopen in CTOX and Oracle, then repeat through the real Business OS wrapper
